deposits.summary: Created lineage_analyzer.py with scan, cluster, promotable commands. Scans 196 builds, identifies 7 multi-build clusters, 18 promotable builds.
deposits.broadcast: Lineage data at Skills/build-promote/state/lineage.json — use for cluster lookups

deposits.summary: Created artifact_classifier.py with classify and classify-cluster commands. Two-layer classification: heuristic (path/extension) + content inspection. Handles 9 categories with confidence levels.
deposits.broadcast: Classifier routes files to: scripts/, assets/, state/, prompts/, references/, or keeps in build

deposits.summary: Created promote.py with run/preview commands. 9-step workflow: pre-flight, naming, classification, directory creation, file migration, path adaptation, SKILL.md generation, protection markers, build finalization. Supports --dry-run, --yes, --cluster modes.
deposits.broadcast: promote.py ready — run with: promote.py preview <slug> to dry-run, or promote.py run <slug> --yes to execute

deposits.summary: Created verify.py with 8 checks: stale paths, script health, import health, SKILL.md completeness, state accessibility, protection markers, build residuals, bytecode cleanup. Supports --fix for auto-fixable issues. Validated against zode-moltbook (8/8 pass).

Created SKILL.md with full documentation. E2E test: promoted builds-audit-cleanup (2 files migrated, 0 path adaptations, 8/8 verification checks pass). Fixed verify.py false positive on SKILL.md provenance metadata. Regression verified on zode-moltbook (18 scripts, 8/8 pass).
